M6-W103DX/ M6-AQ103DX/ M6-W105DX/ M6-W101DX What kind of Maintenance do I get with this charger? This charger comes with a 18-month Maintenance, ensuring that you have support in case of any issues. Our friendly service team is also ready to assist you with any questions or concerns you may have. Is this charger compatible with my HP laptop model? Absolutely! This 65W USB-C charger is compatible with a wide range of HP devices,including the Spectre X2, Elite X2, Envy X2, and various EliteBook models, among others. You can check the compatibility section to see if your specific model is listed. Will this charger generate a lot of heat during use? No, this charger is designed to minimize heat generation while in use. Its efficient power management ensures it remains cool, even during fast charging, allowing you to safely power your devices without worrying about overheating. How quickly can I charge my device with this adapter? This charger supports fast charging with multiple output options: 5V𝌂3A,9V𝌂3A,12V𝌂5A,15V𝌂4.33A,20V𝌂3.25A, MAX Power 65W. It offers power of 15W, 27W, 60W or 65W. This means you can charge your device quickly and efficiently, reducing downtime. What’s included in the purchase? With your purchase, you will receive a 65W power adapter, a power supply cord, exquisite packaging, and our 18-month Maintenance. Additionally, our service team is available for any assistance you may need.
